subcodes.title: Words spoken at the Shrine of the Bab, 1913-12-06
subcodes.first_line: Prostration, according to the explicit text of the Book of God, is confined to the Shrine of the Bab, the Shrine of Baha'u'llah and the Holy House.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ابداً جائز نیست سجود بجهتی جائز نیست سجود بنص کتاب الله مخصوص مقام اعلی
